title: High-throughput screening for SARS-CoV-2 entry inhibition and cell toxicity
author: Jancy, Lupitha, et al.

steps.title: Methods
steps.instruction: In this study, we used a BSL-2 compatible replication-competent vesicular stomatitis virus (VSV) expressing Spike protein of SARS-CoV-2 with eGFP reporter system (VSV-eGFP-SARS-CoV-2) in a recombinant permissive cell system for high-throughput screening of viral entry blockers. The SARS-CoV-2 permissive reporter system encompasses cells that stably express hACE2-tagged cerulean and H2B tagged with mCherry, as a marker of nuclear condensation, which also enables imaging of fused cells among infected EGFP positive cells and could provide real-time information on syncytia formation.

steps.title: Statistical analysis
steps.instruction: Statistical analysis was performed using GraphPad Prism version 9.1.1.
